en: There are three types of conditional sentences.
ja: 条件文には3つのタイプがあります。
vi: Co ba loai cau dieu kien.

en: If the present is not definite, then the first form of the verb is will shall.
ja: 現在が不確定なら、動詞の第1形とwill/shallを使います。
zhTW: 如果現在不確定，則用動詞第一形式加will/shall。
vi: Neu hien tai khong xac dinh, thi dung dong tu dang 1 voi will/shall.

en: If the past is not definite, then the first form of the verb is would should.
ja: 過去が不確定なら、動詞の第1形とwould/shouldを使います。
zhTW: 如果過去不確定，則用動詞第一形式加would/should。
vi: Neu qua khu khong xac dinh, thi dung dong tu dang 1 voi would/should.

en: If the past is perfect, then the third form of the verb is would should.
ja: 過去完了なら、動詞の第3形とwould/shouldを使います。
zhTW: 如果是過去完成式，則用動詞第三形式加would/should。
vi: Neu qua khu hoan thanh, thi dung dong tu dang 3 voi would/should.
